rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH CHUNG VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 23, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA AND FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORPORATIONS' DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to March 24, 2015. rulings.Case Title: BARNABA BIENKOWSKI et al VS. LAWRENCE CHOY et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 23, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT RICKY LAM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT continued to April 10, 2015. Plaintiff's request for continuance under CCP 437c(h) is granted. Plaintiff shall file and serve its supplemental opposition, not to exceed 7 pages, excluding evidence, no later than March 27, 2015. Plaintiff shall re-submit its response to the separate statement in compliance with CCP 437c(b)(3). Defendant shall file and serve supplemental reply, if any, no later than April 3, 2015. = (501/req)
